title: Amtech T1630 60mm Steel Padlock with 4 Keys, Security Padlock, Chrome Plated Hardened Steel Shackle, Precision Locking Mechanism
features: DURABLE: This 60mm satin finish steel padlock has a 10mm hardened steel shackle with a double steel ball bearing and a precision locking mechanism
VERSATILE: Supplied with 4 keys, it is ideal for securing suitcases, lockers, tool boxes, sheds and gates
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description The Amtech Steel Padlock is very safe and secure, thanks to additional features, such as a chrome plated hardened steel shackle and a double steel ball precision locking mechanism, The satin finish also adds durability when used indoors or outdoors. Supplied with 4 keys and flexible enough to use on a variety of security applications around your home, workplace or when you are on the move. Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your security requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
